import java.util.function.Supplier;

// A cause-dropping throw inside a lambda must not affect JV002 for this catch:
// the lambda is its own frame, scanned separately, later.
class LambdaBoundaryChain {
    void m() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            Supplier<Integer> s = () -> {
                throw new RuntimeException(e.getMessage());
            };
            throw new IllegalStateException("wrap", e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
